channel.title: Lube Change - Oilers Daily News
channel.description: Daily Edmonton Oilers news from Oil Country. Hosted by Jason Potter from Hinton, Alberta.
channel.itunes:author: Jason Potter
channel.itunes:summary: Daily Edmonton Oilers news from Oil Country. Your daily dose of Oilers news, game recaps, trades, and analysis.

item.title: Lube Change - Oilers Daily News - Episode 1 - December 03, 2025 at 01:29 PM MST
